description:
Similar to CallbackValueArgument but instead of a value it's a reference for an action.

There are some Sync Delegates in the game that match this component's requirements, but not many.

fields.Callback: The Sync Delegate to call and provide ``Reference`` to.

methods.Call: Call ``Callback`` sync delegate and provide it ``Reference``.
methods.CallAndDestroy: Do ``Call()`` and then destroy this component.
